title: Black Backround
description: Makes the minecraft menu background black.
body:
A simple resource pack that makes the background of the minecraft menu. 
It can work on versions below 1.21, I just haven't tested it.  
## What for?
My Accessibility Settings have Panorama Scroll Speed set to 0, and why focus on the background when there's nothing useful there? For this reason, I made its color non-provocative, that is, black.
